reviewText: Dave and his crew showed up exactly when they said they would and had our drain cleared in under an hour. No mess, no fuss. Will definitely call again.
Lyle came out same day and replaced three damaged roof sections before the next rain. Saved us from a potential flood. Five stars all the way!
Greg and his team installed our new furnace in one day and even swept up after. Heat works great and the price was fair. Highly recommend Summit HVAC.
Rob wired our new workshop addition and passed inspection on the first try. He was professional, knowledgeable, and didn't try to upsell us on stuff we didn't need.
Tom and his renovation crew did our basement bathroom and laundry room. Took a week longer than quoted but the finished product looks incredible. Really happy with it.
Service was okay. Technician was polite but seemed rushed. The drain is cleared but they didn't explain what caused the issue or how to prevent it. Decent for the price.
Roof inspection was fine but the quote took almost 2 weeks to arrive. By then I'd already booked another company. The crew seemed competent, just slow on the admin side.
Furnace works. Installation went fine. Would have been nice to get a walkthrough of the new system since I'm not familiar with the controls. Average experience overall.
Work was done but scheduling was a headache. Got rescheduled twice and nobody called ahead of time to let me know. Not ideal when you're taking time off work.
Kevin showed up and fixed the leak, no complaints there. But the price was higher than the phone estimate by about 20%. I get that things come up but a heads up would be nice.
Worst experience. Charged me $300 to clear a drain and it backed up again within a week. Called back and got told it would be another service charge. Never again.
They no-showed my appointment without calling. I took the afternoon off work. When I finally reached someone they offered to rebook 3 weeks out. Completely unacceptable.
Technician showed up 2 hours late, didn't have the part, had to come back 4 days later. House was without heat the whole time. No compensation offered. Really disappointed.
Electrical work failed its first inspection and Rob seemed more annoyed than accountable. Had to take another day off to be home for the re-inspection. Not impressed.
Basement reno went way over budget - final invoice was 40% higher than quoted. Tom kept finding 'extra work' that wasn't in the contract. Felt nickel and dimed the whole time.
